'''Shulxi''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="GatORW" /> situated in the [[Shulxi system/Legends|Shulxi system]], a part of the [[Southern Core]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" /> Its surface featured beaches. Around the time of the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="GatORW" /> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]] [[Luthus Tadrin]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Tadrin sector/Legends|Tadrin sector]] spent most of this time on the beaches of Shulxi, as well as those of the Core Worlds<ref name="GatORW" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE Spira">{{CSWECite|III|184|Spira}}</ref> [[Spira/Legends|Spira]]. There, Tadrin squandered his part of the wealth of the [[Tadrin family]] as well as bemoaned the decline of the Empire.<ref name="GatORW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shulxi was first mentioned in the [[2004]] [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''.<ref name="GatORW" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Shulxi [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square L-12.<ref name="TEA" />
